units.title: Smooth Manifolds
units.focus: Topological manifolds, smooth structures, examples, and manifolds with boundary.
units.label: Chapter 1

units.title: Smooth Maps
units.focus: Smooth functions, smooth maps, partitions of unity, and local-to-global construction.
units.label: Chapter 2

units.title: Tangent Vectors
units.focus: Tangent vectors, differentials, coordinates, tangent bundle, curve velocities, and functorial views.
units.label: Chapter 3

units.title: Submersions, Immersions, and Embeddings
units.focus: Constant rank maps, embeddings, submersions, smooth covering maps, and local normal forms.
units.label: Chapter 4

units.title: Submanifolds
units.focus: Embedded and immersed submanifolds, map restriction, tangent spaces, and boundary submanifolds.
units.label: Chapter 5

units.title: Sard's Theorem
units.focus: Measure zero, Sard theorem, Whitney embedding and approximation, and transversality.
units.label: Chapter 6

units.title: Lie Groups
units.focus: Basic Lie groups, homomorphisms, subgroups, actions, equivariant maps, and examples.
units.label: Chapter 7

units.title: Vector Fields
units.focus: Vector fields, smooth maps, Lie brackets, and Lie algebra of a Lie group.
units.label: Chapter 8

units.title: Integral Curves and Flows
units.focus: Integral curves, flows, flowouts, manifolds with boundary, Lie derivatives, commuting fields, time-dependent fields, and first-order PDEs.
units.label: Chapter 9

units.title: Vector Bundles
units.focus: Vector bundles, sections, bundle homomorphisms, subbundles, and fiber bundles.
units.label: Chapter 10

units.title: The Cotangent Bundle
units.focus: Covectors, differential of a function, pullbacks, line integrals, and conservative covector fields.
units.label: Chapter 11

units.title: Tensors
units.focus: Multilinear algebra, symmetric and alternating tensors, and tensor fields on manifolds.
units.label: Chapter 12

units.title: Riemannian Metrics
units.focus: Riemannian manifolds, distance function, tangent-cotangent isomorphism, and pseudo-Riemannian metrics.
units.label: Chapter 13

units.title: Differential Forms
units.focus: Alternating tensors, forms on manifolds, exterior derivatives, and examples.
units.label: Chapter 14

units.title: Orientations
units.focus: Orientations of vector spaces and manifolds, Riemannian volume form, and covering maps.
units.label: Chapter 15

units.title: Integration on Manifolds
units.focus: Volume measurement, integration of forms, Stokes theorem, corners, Riemannian integration, and densities.
units.label: Chapter 16

units.title: De Rham Cohomology
units.focus: de Rham groups, homotopy invariance, Mayer-Vietoris, degree theory, and proof scaffolding.
units.label: Chapter 17

units.title: The de Rham Theorem
units.focus: Singular homology and cohomology, smooth singular homology, and de Rham theorem.
units.label: Chapter 18

units.title: Distributions and Foliations
units.focus: Distributions, involutivity, Frobenius theorem, foliations, Lie subgroups, and overdetermined PDEs.
units.label: Chapter 19

units.title: The Exponential Map
units.focus: One-parameter subgroups, exponential map, closed subgroup theorem, infinitesimal generators, Lie correspondence, and normal subgroups.
units.label: Chapter 20

units.title: Quotient Manifolds
units.focus: Group action quotients, covering manifolds, homogeneous spaces, and Lie-theory applications.
units.label: Chapter 21

units.title: Symplectic Manifolds
units.focus: Symplectic tensors, symplectic structures, Darboux theorem, Hamiltonian vector fields, contact structures, and nonlinear first-order PDEs.
units.label: Chapter 22

units.title: Review of Topology
units.focus: Topological spaces, subspaces, products, quotients, connectedness, compactness, homotopy, fundamental group, and coverings.
units.label: Appendix A

units.title: Review of Linear Algebra
units.focus: Vector spaces, linear maps, determinant, inner products, norms, products, and direct sums.
units.label: Appendix B

units.title: Review of Calculus
units.focus: Multivariable calculus, derivatives, inverse function theorem, and local analytic tools.
units.label: Appendix C

units.title: Review of Differential Equations
units.focus: ODE existence, uniqueness, flows, and differential equation background for smooth manifolds.
units.label: Appendix D
